name: Zucchini Health Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, mix the eggs and honey until well combined.
3. Add wheat germ, vanilla, bran, oil, grated zucchini, baking powder, nuts, baking soda, raisins, and cinnamon to the egg mixture. Mix until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Grease two loaf pans with oil or cooking spray.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pans.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 60 to 70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
